summary: Dashboard loading state mostly meets requirements with proper mobile layout, beta messaging, and appropriate CTAs. Minor palette violations include use of neutral backgrounds instead of diner palette.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white backgrounds instead of diner palette surfaces (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea). The main content area appears to use generic white rather than the specified cream #fff8ea.

Signed-in app chrome should remain visually separated from public marketing palette, but the current implementation may be too neutral rather than establishing a coherent authenticated brand experience.

actions.description: Confirm whether authenticated dashboard should use diner palette cream backgrounds or maintain visual separation as specified in M.universal.4
Check if the mobile drawer navigation at 390px properly supports billing and other dashboard section access as required by mobile narrow contract
